note: OWNER-CONTROLLED. The ONLY place a curated canonical maker may live. No machine writes to this file. Each decision names the canonical maker for a performance, citing the evidence IDs (from maker-evidence.json) that support it; the canonical_maker must match a maker named by a cited, substantive (verified, pinned) evidence item. Anything not decided here stays `review` — no verified-maker hint can move a performance out of review.

schema.canonical_maker: the maker string, exactly as named by a cited substantive evidence item
schema.maker_type: makeup_supervisor | makeup_artist | prosthetics | creature_effects | designer | sculptor | mask_or_suit | unknown
evidence_ids: unique content-addressed ids from that performance's dossier; at least one must be a substantive verified/pinned quote naming the canonical_maker
